_comment: Project Compass — search/keyword config derived from 6 team CVs (Phase 1 output). Used by the daily fetch engine to query JSearch (Google for Jobs) and filter results. Review & approve before Phase 2.
generated_for: Punch / Market Pulse team — customer support, operations, telecalling/sales backgrounds

analytics._note: Google Analytics 4. Paste your Measurement ID (looks like G-XXXXXXXXXX) to enable visit + Apply-click tracking. Leave blank to disable.

fetch._note: pages_per_query: how many result pages to pull per search (≈10 jobs/page). 3 ≈ 3x coverage. Cost: 35 queries × pages calls/day. Pro tier (10k/mo) easily covers 3. The JSEARCH_PAGES env var overrides this if set.

filters._min_salary_note: Drops jobs whose STATED salary is below this (₹/month). Jobs with no salary stated are kept (we can't know).

fintech_broking_boost._note: Optional domain boost — all 6 candidates come from a trading/broking platform; these searches raise relevance. Toggle 'enabled' to false to treat search as generic-only.

locations._note: Search pan-India; the dashboard's city filter narrows client-side. Team home cities listed for surfacing/labelling.
